config.neo4j.topic.cypher.event-transformed: WITH event WHERE event.event_id IS NOT NULL AND event.user_id IS NOT NULL MERGE (e:Event {id: event.event_id}) ON CREATE SET e.title = event.event_title, e.category = event.category MERGE (u:User {id: event.user_id}) ON CREATE SET u.user_id = event.user_id CREATE (u)-[:INTERACTED {type: event.event_type, booking_id: COALESCE(event.booking_id, 'N/A'), quantity: COALESCE(event.quantity, 0), amount: COALESCE(event.total_amount, 0.0), timestamp: event.timestamp}]->(e)
